companies.name: Bajaj
companies.description: Golchha Group operates the first and largest Bajaj CKD assembly plant in Nepal, utilizing hi-tech tools and equipment for assembly. The brand's network includes extensive showrooms, service centers, and spare parts retail across Nepal.

companies.name: KTM
companies.description: The KTM CKD assembly plant is staffed by over 50 skilled engineers, working with advanced equipment. With a daily production capacity of 100 motorcycles, each unit is carefully assembled and goes through multiple quality checks to ensure reliability.

companies.name: Bajaj Commercial Vehicles
companies.description: The Bajaj commercial vehicle assembly plant boasts production of 100 vehicles a day. To ensure exceptional standards, the conveyor system used for assembling each vehicle gets regular quality checks.

companies.name: Triumph Motorcycle
companies.description: Golchha Group launched Triumph's 3S (Sales, Service, and Spares) facilities in Nepal in 2024, setting a new benchmark in the premium motorcycle segment. As the official representative of Triumph Motorcycles in Nepal, Golchha Group is committed to delivering unparalleled performance, heritage, and customer satisfaction.

companies.name: Chetak EV
companies.description: Since its inception in 1972 AD, Chetak has been a symbol of trust and innovation in mobility. Now, with the launch of its latest EV model, the Chetak 3501, it has ignited excitement in the Nepalese market.

companies.name: Servo
companies.description: Servo, a brand under Indian Oil Corporation, holds a leading market share in Nepal's lubricant sector. In 2023, Servo entered a joint venture with Indian Oil Corporation and Hulas Lube Private Limited to establish a lubricant blending plant.

companies.name: Hulas Lube Private Limited
companies.description: In 2023, Servo entered a joint venture with Indian Oil Corporation and Hulas Lube Private Limited to establish a lubricant blending plant.

companies.name: EuroGrip Tyres
companies.description: EuroGrip Tyres, the fastest-growing tyre company in Nepal, features a network of 70 dealers, 350 retailers, and 725 workshops. They offer an extensive range of 150 varieties of 2W and 3W tyres, with advanced air seal technology.

companies.name: Lifestyle
companies.description: Lifestyle embodies the motto 'Bikes, Coffee, Lifestyle,' serving as a vibrant hub for the biking community and enthusiasts. Biker's Café operates as a retail outlet for flagship motorcycles and offers a selection of automotive and lifestyle gear.

companies.name: Him Electronics Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Golchha Group's electronics division, Him Electronics, offers a wide range of products, including household and kitchen appliances, smartphones, lighting, electrical systems, and renewable energy supplies. Him Electronics represents brands like Samsung, Indo Asian, Chint, Ahuja, and Himstar, with over 700 retail outlets, 5 regional offices, 4 distribution centers, and 40+ service points.

companies.name: Samsung Digital Plaza
companies.description: Golchha Group's Lifestyle division includes 13 flagship Samsung stores offering a premium range of Samsung products. Customers can enjoy spacious stores, first-class service, and knowledgeable sales staff.

companies.name: SwitchOn
companies.description: Golchha Group's retail presence includes 10 company-owned showrooms and 4 SwitchOn outlets showcasing the entire range of Him Electronics products.

companies.name: Samsung
companies.description: Official production and after-sales service partner. Golchha Group operates Nepal's first TV production facility and air conditioner production facility as the official production partner for Samsung.

companies.name: Chint
companies.description: Brand represented by Him Electronics in Nepal.

companies.name: Ahuja
companies.description: Brand represented by Him Electronics in Nepal.

companies.name: IndoAsian
companies.description: Brand represented by Him Electronics in Nepal.

companies.name: Hulas Fin Service Ltd.
companies.description: A pivotal segment of Golchha Group’s expansive portfolio is its robust financing business. Through strategic investments and an unwavering focus on customer-centric financial solutions, the Group has established itself as a leader in Nepal's non-banking financial sector.

companies.name: Hulas Finserv
companies.description: The financing arm of Golchha Group offers a comprehensive range of services, including two-wheelers, three-wheelers, four-wheelers, reconditioned vehicles, mobile phones, consumer electronics, laptops, and furniture.

companies.name: Glocal
companies.description: At Golchha Group, our commitment extends beyond business—it embraces education as a cornerstone of progress. Recognizing the power of education, the Group, in collaboration with Glocal has invested in creating and supporting institutions that cover higher education and vocational training.

companies.name: Embark College
companies.description: An educational institution that covers higher education and vocational training, supported by Golchha Group to provide quality education that equips students with the skills needed to succeed in a rapidly changing world.

companies.name: Union Life Insurance Co. Ltd
companies.description: A significant and vital part of Golchha Group’s extensive portfolio is its life insurance business, where it serves as a promoter. Understanding the importance of life insurance for financial security and peace of mind, the Group has invested strategically to meet the varied needs of individuals and families across Nepal.

companies.name: Himalayan Life Insurance
companies.description: A significant and vital part of Golchha Group’s extensive portfolio is its life insurance business, where it serves as a promoter. Understanding the importance of life insurance for financial security and peace of mind, the Group has invested strategically to meet the varied needs of individuals and families across Nepal.

companies.name: Hester Bioscience
companies.description: A dynamic and emerging segment of Golchha Group’s extensive portfolio is its animal bio-science business. In a joint venture with Hester Bioscience Limited India, the Group aims to advance animal health and nutrition to boost agricultural productivity and sustainability. Their division creates veterinary medicines, nutritional supplements, and health management solutions to enhance the well-being of livestock and pets.

companies.name: Saurya Bidhut Power
companies.description: A forward-thinking and impactful segment of Golchha Group’s expansive portfolio is its alternative energy business, with a strong emphasis on solar energy solutions. The division focuses on providing efficient, cost-effective, and environmentally friendly solar energy solutions to meet the diverse energy needs of individuals, businesses, and communities across Nepal.

companies.name: Himalayan Re
companies.description: Golchha Group is a major promoter in reinsurance business, committed to strengthening Nepal's insurance sector. Through continuous education and collaboration with industry stakeholders, they help insurers adopt best practices in risk management and reinsurance.

companies.name: Biscope Entertainment
companies.description: A production banner and entertainment entity involved in producing Nepali feature films. It represents a collaboration between Mr. Shekhar Golchha, Chairman of Golchha Group, and Mr. Ranjit Acharya, CEO of Prisma Advertising, aiming to promote meaningful Nepali cinema.

companies.name: Paran: Saas Le Hoina Saath Le
companies.description: A new Nepali feature film released in 2025 under the banner of Biscope Entertainment. The film delivers a heartfelt social message that life is not just about breathing but about standing together with compassion and support, combining emotional storytelling, powerful performances, and cinematic excellence.
